name: Classic Debugging Duck
tagline: Listens patiently while your bug explains itself.

name: Midnight Debugging Duck
tagline: For production issues that only appear after sunset.

name: Stack Trace Duck
tagline: Stares at logs until the truth floats to the surface.

name: Socrates Duck
tagline: Answers every question with a smaller, stranger question.

name: Camus Duck
tagline: Finds meaning in the absurdity of flaky tests.

name: Captain Quackbeard
tagline: Keeps your bathtub fleet pointed toward adventure.

name: Kraken Survivor Duck
tagline: Has seen things in the deep end and lived to squeak.

name: Meditation Duck
tagline: Breathe in, quack out, retry the build.

name: Spa Day Duck
tagline: For when your code and your shoulders both need release.

name: Edgar Allan Poe Duck
tagline: Quoth the duck: nevermore merge on Friday.
